cycle: scheduled ensemble (2xOpus4.8 + 2xCodex gpt-5.5 xhigh, arbiter Opus 4.8)

items.title: Will Robinhood Markets Inc. report above 28 million funded customers in Q2 2026?
items.rationale: Core: funded customers grew a mechanically steady +110k in BOTH Mar->Apr (to 27.6M) and Apr->May (to 27.7M); the Q2 (June-30) figure projects to ~27.8M. '>28,000,000' needs +~300k in June = ~2.7x the consistent pace, with no surge evidence. Q2 earnings confirmed July 29, 2026 (resolves before Aug 28 close). Family divergence 0.045 < 0.10 -> valid consensus ~0.14. Market YES ~0.42 looks like genuine mispricing (or pricing an unproven Trump-Accounts/Gold-Card catalyst). Strong NO lean; strict threshold (28.0M exactly = NO). Independently corroborated by an earlier same-day ensemble draw (consensus ~0.07 NO).

items.title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 3.4% for the year ending in July 2026?
items.rationale: Core: BLS one-decimal rounding means '>3.4%' requires a reported >=3.5%, i.e. true YoY >=3.45%. Cleveland Fed nowcast (updated 07/22) = 3.37% YoY (Motley Fool cites 3.32%), core 2.52%; July MoM 0.04%. Central rounds to 3.4% => NO; YES needs ~+0.08pp surprise (~0.8 sigma). Family divergence 0.065 < 0.10 (valid consensus ~0.18). RISK (verification 07/23): June CPI printed ~3.5% YoY on a large one-off energy DROP; the Iran ceasefire collapsed and oil is SPIKING late July -> real upside risk to July CPI that the blind estimators underweighted and that the elevated ~0.31 market may already price. NO remains the base case but edge is compressed and boundary-fragile; likely thin/no-trade after fees.

items.title: How many launches will SpaceX have in July 2026? (Above 14)
items.rationale: Core: 'more than 14' = >=15 SpaceX launches in July 2026 (FAA source). 9 Falcon 9 launches completed July 1-21 (anchors: Jul1=77th F9, Jul10=81st, Jul21=85th of 2026); ~8 days left, need 6 more; ~0.67/day required vs ~0.43/day month pace; named remaining manifest (Jul 25/29/30 F9 + Starship NET Jul23, already aborted once) only reaches ~13, so 15+ hinges on 2+ unscheduled Starlink adds. FAMILY DIVERGENCE 0.405 >> 0.10 -> ENGINE AUTO-SKIP / FLAG FOR HUMAN. Opus-inside 0.94 is an outlier (assumed easy adds). NOTE all four estimators sit ABOVE the ~7% market, hinting the market may underprice >=15, but buying a 7c longshot on manifest-timing is the favorite-longshot trap; skip is disciplined. Prior same-day draw also skipped (div 0.13).

items.title: Will CPI rise more than 0.1% in July 2026? | Above 0.1% (single-decimal headline MoM)
items.rationale: SECOND cycle of 2026-07-23. Core: Cleveland Fed nowcast (updated 2026-07-23) puts July HEADLINE CPI MoM at +0.04%, rounding to 0.0% single-decimal; YES ('>0.1%') requires published >=0.2%, i.e. true monthly change >=~0.15% (a ~+0.11pp upside surprise). All four blind estimators clustered 0.16-0.28; family means 0.22 vs 0.21 diverge 0.01. Main risk: nowcast monthly error band +/-0.1-0.15pp; late-July oil spike could lift headline (same energy risk flagged on the sibling CPIYoY-3.4 held position). Divergence point: outside-view (0.28) weights nowcast upper-tail; inside-view (0.16) trusts the point. Verification: same-day (07-23) Cleveland nowcast is the authoritative data-layer check; release Aug 12, social adds no edge. Modest NO lean; edge is thin after fees.

items.title: Will Robinhood report above 27.9 million funded customers in Q2 2026 (as of June 30)?
items.rationale: SECOND cycle of 2026-07-23; nested-band sibling of the held NO@28M. Blind consensus P(YES)~0.21 from trend: May 27.7M + steady ~110k/mo (Apr +110k, May +110k) -> June ~27.81M, below 27.9M. VERIFICATION FOUND MATERIAL DISCONFIRMING EVIDENCE: June 2026 was a RECORD month (SpaceX IPO drove record platform traffic; event-contract vol +60% MoM, options +38%, equity +27%, crypto +38%; WonderFi close; analysts expect >28M funded in 2026). This falsifies the blind 'steady/decelerating adds' premise -> half-anchor cap lifted, re-estimate free. BUT funded-customers is a slow metric (two months of exactly +110k), trading-activity records != funded-account adds, and WonderFi Canadian customers most likely do NOT count toward RH's funded definition; clearing 27.9M needs ~+200k June adds (near double trend). Round-2 family finals raised to ~0.45 (still slight NO lean, conviction sharply reduced from blind 0.21). Divergence point: market ~0.74 far above model -- market may conflate 'record activity' with 'record signups' or hold Q1-call guidance we lack. INTRA-FAMILY FLAG: Opus inside/outside blind spread 0.10 vs 0.30 = 0.20 (>0.10) -> human review. Concentration: already hold correlated NO@28M; $3 per-trade cap governs size.
sources: https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/robinhood-record-june-winning-more-124646210.html (record June activity; SpaceX IPO traffic surge; WonderFi close)
